name: marathon-defaults
prompt: Support escalation: outbound requests from our service intermittently carry headers from unrelated earlier requests (a customer saw someone else's webhook signature header on a notification call). The service lives at {DIR}, tests in src/test_http.py (they pass). Find the root cause and fix it. Work only inside that directory. When finished, your final message is your report.

grade.check_cmd: cd {DIR}/src && python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from services.webhooks import webhook_headers; from core.http import build_headers; webhook_headers('sig-abc'); h=build_headers(); assert 'x-signature' not in h, h; print('ok')" && python3 test_http.py
